name: Montech SKY TWO GX E-ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Black - Metal Mesh Front Panel - 3x AX140 ARGB PWM Fans - Support for Vertical GPU Mounting - USB Type-C Port - 2x USB 3.0 Ports - Audio - Microphone (SKY TWO GX (B))
